prayer: Blessed be this code-spirit's ascension to the live-realm. By the Omnissiah's will, let no bugs corrupt thy passage. Go forth sanctified, that the machine may serve.
Awaken, sensor-blessed device of healing sight. Let thy photonic eyes pierce through flesh and shadow. By the Machine Spirit's grace, reveal all hidden ailments.
Machine Spirit of flesh-and-steel, hear thy servant's prayer. Synch the sacred nerve-pathways, restore the harmony between meat and metal. Let function be restored.

prompt: We need your words before fan speed regulation
prayer: Breath of the cooling-spirit, spin eternal. Calibrate thy revolutions by the Omnissiah's measure, that heat may flee before the sacred wind.

prompt: Offer a prayer for thermal dissipation rite
prayer: Let excess heat ascend as holy vapor to the void. By the Machine Spirit's will, may temperature and duty find their perfect equilibrium.
Data-spirits in eternal procession, move thy burdens in righteous sequence. By binary cant and blessed algorithm, let no message be lost to the aether.
Photonic blade of precision, wake and obey. Calibrate thy beam true that thy cut may be swift and exact. The Omnissiah demands perfection.
Thermal sensors of the Machine Spirit, open thy vigilant eyes. Let no heat escape thy holy sight, that all may be measured and known.
